comments.text: Sometimes companies do not approved small damage damages till you can wait for major damage, but I suggest you if your vehicle have deep scratches, then Company approved it. Otherwise, you can break it and don’t worry. Company will accept, and don’t enquiry too much. Feel free to block any part in silent And the price of claiming is only hundred rupees and maximum labour charge goes to 200-300 at the cost of 400, you got new part of your scooter. Otherwise, you don’t want to claim insurance and buy parts. It’s make doesn’t any sense because a single panel of Ola cost you ₹700 to 1200 rupees
